property.name: subtitle
property.label: Subtitle
property.default: Turning player signals into trusted actions, measurable outcomes, and executive decisions.

property.name: showBadges
property.label: Show Capability Badges
property.description: Show the capability badge row under the header.

property.name: activePanelDefault
property.label: Default Active Panel
property.description: Which detail panel to show by default.

property.name: kpiJson
property.label: KPI Tiles JSON Override
property.description: JSON array of KPI objects. If blank, uses PlayStation demo defaults.

property.name: lifecycleJson
property.label: Lifecycle Stages JSON Override
property.description: JSON array of lifecycle stage objects. If blank, uses PlayStation demo defaults.

property.name: playerBreakdownJson
property.label: Player Breakdown JSON Override
property.description: Reserved for future dynamic player breakdown data.

property.name: readinessJson
property.label: Data Readiness JSON Override
property.description: JSON array of readiness capability objects. If blank, uses PlayStation demo defaults.
